sentence: I wake up at seven o'clock
explanation: The basic pattern is Subject + Verb + Time: <I wake up at seven o'clock>.

sentence: She brushes her teeth every morning
explanation: Follow the pattern Subject + Verb + Object + Time expression.

sentence: He takes a shower before breakfast
explanation: The pattern is Subject + Verb + Object + Time: <He takes a shower before breakfast>.

sentence: We have lunch at twelve thirty
explanation: Meals follow the pattern: Subject + have + meal + at + time.

sentence: They go to school by bus
explanation: The pattern is Subject + go to + place + by + transport.

sentence: I get dressed after my shower
explanation: <Get dressed> is a phrasal verb meaning to put on clothes.

sentence: She reads a book before bed
explanation: The pattern is Subject + Verb + Object + Time: <She reads a book before bed>.

sentence: He walks to work every day
explanation: The pattern is Subject + Verb + to + place + frequency.

sentence: We eat dinner at seven in the evening
explanation: The pattern is Subject + eat + meal + at + time + in the + part of day.

sentence: I go to bed at ten o'clock
explanation: We say <go to bed> (no article) when talking about sleeping.

sentence: She makes breakfast for her family
explanation: The pattern is Subject + Verb + Object + for + person.

sentence: He does his homework after school
explanation: The pattern is Subject + do + possessive + homework + time.
